title: Morgan Stanley Company Overview
text: Morgan Stanley is a global financial services firm headquartered in New York. The company advises, originates, trades, manages, and distributes capital for corporations, governments, institutions, and individuals. Its main business segments are Institutional Securities, Wealth Management, and Investment Management. Institutional Securities includes investment banking, advisory, underwriting, sales and trading, lending, prime brokerage, and other capital markets services. Wealth Management provides financial advisory, brokerage, banking, lending, retirement, workplace, and self-directed investing services, including the E*TRADE platform. Investment Management offers active and customized investment strategies across public markets, private markets, alternatives, and liquidity products. For investment analysis, Morgan Stanley is important because earnings are tied to capital markets activity, trading volumes, investment banking deals, client asset levels, wealth management flows, interest rates, credit conditions, regulation, and technology investment.
